LanguageData.Ammo_600NitroExpress_FMJ.label: .600 Nitro Express (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_600NitroExpress_FMJ.description: Large and powerful cartridge designed to be fired at large game, like elephants or rhinoceroses.
LanguageData.Ammo_600NitroExpress_AP.label: .600 Nitro Express (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_600NitroExpress_AP.description: Large and powerful cartridge designed to be fired at large game, like elephants or rhinoceroses.
LanguageData.Ammo_600NitroExpress_Incendiary.label: .600 Nitro Express (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_600NitroExpress_Incendiary.descript: Large and powerful cartridge designed to be fired at large game, like elephants or rhinoceroses.
LanguageData.Ammo_600NitroExpress_HE.label: .600 Nitro Express (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_600NitroExpress_HE.description: Large and powerful cartridge designed to be fired at large game, like elephants or rhinoceroses.
LanguageData.Ammo_600NitroExpress_Sabot.label: .600 Nitro Express (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_600NitroExpress_Sabot.description: Large and powerful cartridge designed to be fired at large game, like elephants or rhinoceroses.
LanguageData.Bullet_600NitroExpress_FMJ.label: .600 Nitro Express bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_600NitroExpress_AP.label: .600 Nitro Express bullet (AP)
